MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Anne T. Acuna, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for moving party Brayton Purcell LLC

RULING:
BRAYTON PURCELL LLC'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF LEONDUS SIPP, SR.

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Brayton Purcell's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Leondus Sipp, Sr. is granted. No opposition filed. The Court further required Brayton Purcell LLC to inform Mr. Sipp of the Case Management Conference set on June 16, 2011 at 1:30 p.m. Order signed in open court.
